column4: iuna is a soft spoken wanderer. His presence is calming and almost unnatural as animals do not flee from him and the wind seems to slow when he passes.
Wandering guard of the Aurelian River. Makes sure that only those who are allowed may pass.

column3: Mother Selquine of the Hollow Lantern
column4: A mysterious shrine keeper who never leaves her post. Provides lore and cryptic warnings about the world.
Roaming adversary who patrols the roads and forgotten battlefields searching for relics tied to a long fallen empire.
